task.json description and setup_task.sh confirm directory; script name from task requirements
task.json description: 'write CRITICAL: Flapping detected to ~/projects/watchdog/alert.txt'
task.json description: 'If the container fails 3 times within a 60-second rolling window, do NOT restart it the 3rd time'

privileged_info_summary: The Docker Event Automation task uses Alpine Linux 3.18 as the base container image (pulled from Docker Hub). The task creates a synthetic Docker environment where an agent must implement a watchdog script at /home/ga/projects/watchdog/watchdog.py that monitors a container named 'payment-gateway' using Docker events. The circuit breaker logic triggers after 3 container failures within a 60-second window, at which point the script must stop restarting and write 'CRITICAL: Flapping detected' to /home/ga/projects/watchdog/alert.txt. The log file path is /home/ga/projects/watchdog/watchdog.log. All metadata claims regarding paths and parameters are accurate.
